summary: Header title glitch bug fix VERIFIED. All 9 admin sections now display correct header labels using SECTION_LABELS mapping. No flicker during rapid switching. F5 refresh preserves correct header. Navigation remains fast (82ms avg).

bug_fix_verification.issue: Header showed raw section IDs like 'Ledger' instead of 'Transfers Queue', 'Support' instead of 'Support Tickets'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Header was using raw activeSection with simple capitalization instead of proper display labels
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added SECTION_LABELS mapping in App.js and getSectionLabel() function. Header now uses getSectionLabel(activeSection)
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: YES - All header labels match sidebar labels

critical_code_review_comments: SECTION_LABELS mapping correctly defined at line 1723-1736 in App.js
getSectionLabel() function properly falls back to capitalized section ID for unknown sections
Header at line 2804 correctly uses getSectionLabel(activeSection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header title glitch bug has been fixed and verified. SECTION_LABELS mapping in App.js ensures header displays proper labels like 'Transfers Queue' instead of 'Ledger', 'Support Tickets' instead of 'Support'. All 9 sections tested and working correctly.
